## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally or explained why testing was not needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or architecture changed.
- [ ] I kept the MVP scope local-first and avoided unnecessary complexity.

## Notes

Add any review notes, limitations or follow-up tasks.
